name: Q-12 --query --subagent-id filters log entries to a single subagent per §26
command: for i in review-types review-compliance review-types; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/agent-invocations.sh" --append --subagent-id $i --prompt-id p --prompt-version 1.0.0 --model sonnet --tokens-in 100 --tokens-out 50 --latency-ms 1000 --exit-code 0 2>/dev/null; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/agent-invocations.sh" --query --subagent-id review-types --format jsonl >out.jsonl 2>err.txt && [ "$(wc -l < out.jsonl | tr -d ' ')" = "2" ] && echo filtered 1>&2
